goal: Create a journal-based summary and Medium-style draft for: Hubungan hipertensi dan latihan fisik

steps.step: Select one health topic from the backlog
steps.purpose: Choose a clear topic that will be processed in the workflow.

steps.step: Search for relevant scientific journal sources

steps.purpose: Turn research notes into an evidence-based summary.

steps.purpose: Convert the summary into a readable public-facing article draft.

success_criteria: Outputs are reviewed by a human before publishing.
